branch_goal: test decision-bearing units rather than arbitrary reasoning lines

chosen_family.name: tower_of_hanoi
chosen_family.reason: lowest-risk family for validating whether decision, execution, and bookkeeping labels explain the previously observed early-planning signal

deferred_families.name: countdown
deferred_families.reason: needs equation-state units plus search-cost-aware evaluation before reuse

deferred_families.name: quantum_lock
deferred_families.reason: needs stronger solving reliability before transition-based unit work is meaningful

notes: This config freezes the design boundary for the redefinition branch, not a new family sweep.
No execution beyond tiny dev-slice preparation should occur until the new unit definition is accepted.
The old line-level object branch remains a documented bootstrap baseline only.
